title: SHC Fnaf Ultimate Custom Plushie
description: Add plushies from fnaf for decoration!
body:
With this pack you can have a lot of plushies form the Five Night's at Freddy's saga!

Put them in a item frame for place it!

We corrently have 121 Plushies in the pack.

For obtain the plushies you just need to rename a carved pumpkin with one of the next names:

Fnaf 1 Plushies:

-Freddy Plush
-Bonnie Plush
-Chica Plush
-Foxy Plush
-Mr Cupcake Plush
-Golden Freddy Plush
-Phone Guy Plush
